task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'imagery' workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the GeoServer 'Workspaces' page with 'imagery' listed, or the 'New Workspace' form being filled out with the name 'imagery'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of an ImageMosaic data store named 'world_mosaic_store'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the 'Stores' page with 'world_mosaic_store' listed under the 'imagery' workspace, or the 'Add a new data store' page where 'ImageMosaic' is selected as the raster data source.

task_completion.description: Verify the data store is configured to point to the correct mosaic directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the store configuration page for 'world_mosaic_store' showing the 'URL' or connection parameter field explicitly set to 'file:mosaics/world_quadrants'.

task_completion.description: Verify the layer is published with the name 'global_mask'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the 'Layers' page showing 'global_mask' listed, or the 'Edit Layer' / 'Publish Layer' page with the Name field set to 'global_mask'.

task_completion.description: Verify the layer is enabled and bounding boxes are correctly computed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the 'Edit Layer' page for 'global_mask' showing the 'Enabled' checkbox checked, and the 'Native Bounding Box' and 'Lat/Lon Bounding Box' fields populated with valid coordinates (e.g., -180, -90, 180, 90) rather than being empty or default zeros.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the GeoServer web administration GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the GeoServer admin interface (http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/). The agent should not be using terminal commands (like curl to the REST API) to configure the server.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the GUI by directly editing GeoServer configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows showing the agent editing XML files (e.g., workspace.xml, datastore.xml, featuretype.xml) inside the GeoServer data directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely interacted with the forms to compute bounds and save.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should capture intermediate steps like clicking 'Compute from data' or 'Compute from native bounds' links, and clicking the 'Save' button at the bottom of the configuration pages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Workspace: 'imagery'. Expected Store: 'world_mosaic_store' (Type: ImageMosaic). Expected Layer: 'global_mask'. Mosaic Directory URL: 'file:mosaics/world_quadrants'. The underlying raster data covers the full global extent in EPSG:4326, so the correctly computed bounding boxes should reflect Min X: -180, Min Y: -90, Max X: 180, Max Y: 90.
